files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,59 @@
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+final class CleanupTextProcessingTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testParseCorrectionsDeduplicatesPreferredTermsAndValidReplacements() {
+        let corrections = CleanupTextProcessing.parseCorrections(
+            preferredDraft: "\n  Ghost Pepper \nGhost Pepper\nOpenAI\nopenai\n",
+            misheardDraft: """
+            ghost paper -> Ghost Pepper
+            invalid line
+            open a i -> OpenAI
+            Ghost Paper -> Ghost Pepper
+            """
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(corrections.preferredTranscriptions, ["Ghost Pepper", "OpenAI"])
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            corrections.misheardReplacements,
+            [
+                CleanupReplacement(wrong: "ghost paper", right: "Ghost Pepper"),
+                CleanupReplacement(wrong: "open a i", right: "OpenAI"),
+            ]
+        )
+    }
+
+    func testDeterministicCorrectionsProtectPreferredTermsAndUseLongestFirst() {
+        let corrections = CleanupParsedCorrections(
+            preferredTranscriptions: ["Ghost Pepper", "OpenAI"],
+            misheardReplacements: [
+                CleanupReplacement(wrong: "ghost paper", right: "Ghost Pepper"),
+                CleanupReplacement(wrong: "ghost", right: "spirit"),
+                CleanupReplacement(wrong: "open a i", right: "OpenAI"),
+            ]
+        )
+
+        let result = CleanupTextProcessing.applyDeterministicCorrections(
+            to: "ghost paper launched open a i inside Ghost Pepper",
+            corrections: corrections
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(result, "Ghost Pepper launched OpenAI inside Ghost Pepper")
+    }
+
+    func testDeterministicCorrectionsRespectWordBoundaries() {
+        let corrections = CleanupParsedCorrections(
+            preferredTranscriptions: [],
+            misheardReplacements: [
+                CleanupReplacement(wrong: "ghost", right: "spirit")
+            ]
+        )
+
+        let result = CleanupTextProcessing.applyDeterministicCorrections(
+            to: "ghost ghostwriter midghost ghost.",
+            corrections: corrections
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(result, "spirit ghostwriter midghost spirit.")
+    }
+}

@@ -134,4 +134,77 @@ final class SettingsStoreTests: XCTestCase {
         XCTAssertEqual(defaults.string(forKey: "preferredTranscriptionsDraft"), "OpenAI => OpenAI")
         XCTAssertEqual(defaults.string(forKey: "commonlyMisheardDraft"), "ship it => ship it")
     }
+
+    func testPreferredTranscriptionsStayParsedAndDeduplicated() {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+
+        store.preferredTranscriptionsDraft = "\n  Ghost Pepper  \nGhost Pepper\nOpenAI\n  \nopenai\n"
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.preferredTranscriptions, ["Ghost Pepper", "OpenAI"])
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.ocrCustomWords, ["Ghost Pepper", "OpenAI"])
+    }
+
+    func testCommonlyMisheardDraftParsesValidPairsAndKeepsRawDraft() {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+
+        store.commonlyMisheardDraft = """
+        ghost paper -> Ghost Pepper
+        invalid line
+        open a i -> OpenAI
+        Ghost Paper -> Ghost Pepper
+        """
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            store.commonlyMisheardReplacements,
+            [
+                CleanupReplacement(wrong: "ghost paper", right: "Ghost Pepper"),
+                CleanupReplacement(wrong: "open a i", right: "OpenAI"),
+            ]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            defaults.string(forKey: "commonlyMisheardDraft"),
+            """
+            ghost paper -> Ghost Pepper
+            invalid line
+            open a i -> OpenAI
+            Ghost Paper -> Ghost Pepper
+            """
+        )
+    }
+
+    func testAppendingLearnedReplacementUpdatesDraftAndParsedReplacements() {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+        store.commonlyMisheardDraft = "open a i -> OpenAI"
+
+        let appended = store.appendLearnedReplacement(wrong: "ghost paper", right: "Ghost Pepper")
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(appended, CleanupReplacement(wrong: "ghost paper", right: "Ghost Pepper"))
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            store.commonlyMisheardDraft,
+            """
+            open a i -> OpenAI
+            ghost paper -> Ghost Pepper
+            """
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            store.commonlyMisheardReplacements,
+            [
+                CleanupReplacement(wrong: "open a i", right: "OpenAI"),
+                CleanupReplacement(wrong: "ghost paper", right: "Ghost Pepper"),
+            ]
+        )
+    }
+
+    func testAppendingLearnedReplacementIgnoresEmptyAndDuplicatePairs() {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+        store.commonlyMisheardDraft = "ghost paper -> Ghost Pepper"
+
+        XCTAssertNil(store.appendLearnedReplacement(wrong: "", right: "Ghost Pepper"))
+        XCTAssertNil(store.appendLearnedReplacement(wrong: "ghost paper", right: "Ghost Pepper"))
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.commonlyMisheardDraft, "ghost paper -> Ghost Pepper")
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            store.commonlyMisheardReplacements,
+            [CleanupReplacement(wrong: "ghost paper", right: "Ghost Pepper")]
+        )
+    }
 }
